case_title: GORDON WALLACE et al VS. RIGOBERTO ANTONIO PEREZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-14-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
